item.title: Revisiting Jessica Alba’s Dance Film Honey
item.description: I take a lighthearted look back at Honey and its place in early 2000s dance movies. A nostalgic review with a playful twist.

media:content.media:title: Revisiting Jessica Alba’s Dance Film Honey

item.title: I Finally Watched Raise Your Voice
item.description: A first-time watch of Raise Your Voice that didn’t go quite how I expected.
